meta.title: DentalIA — Smile, intelligently cared for.
meta.description: Boutique dental clinics in Rome, Palma de Mallorca, and London — with an AI assistant that books your appointment in any language.

home.heroSubtitle: Three boutique clinics in Rome, Palma, and London. Twelve standard services. One AI assistant — Sofia — that answers your questions and books your appointment in your language, any time.
